ValidationRule.description: Operations Admin System Administrator New Finance Shipping Coordinator Office Staff
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName),"Closed Won"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9a"), NOT($UserRole.Id = "00E5a000001BBHR"), NOT($Profile.Id = "00e5a0000018d9G"), NOT($UserRole.Id = "00E5a000001QTSr"), NOT($UserRole.Id = "00E5a000001QTSm"), NOT($Permission.Opportunity_Edit_Closed_Won) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You Can Not Edit This Opportunity Because Has Been Closed Won
